args.command: mkdir -p /workspace/report /workspace/prs /workspace/testing/environments /workspace/testing/hardware /workspace/testing/reproductions /workspace/analysis /workspace/analysis/scripts /workspace/research/notes /workspace/decisions
cd /workspace && git init && git config user.name "Audit Bot" && git config user.email "audit@dreamserver.local"
cd /workspace && git remote add origin https://github.com/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer.git && git fetch origin --depth=1 main 2>&1 | head -20
cd /workspace && git checkout FETCH_HEAD -b main-baseline
cd /workspace && ls -la
cd /workspace && git fetch origin --depth=1 pull/*/head 2>&1 | head -100
cd /workspace && git ls-remote origin | grep -E "refs/pull/" | head -100
cd /workspace && git ls-remote origin | grep -E "refs/pull/" | grep "/head$" | wc -l
cd /workspace && git ls-remote origin | grep -E "refs/pull/" | grep "/head$" | awk '{print $2}' | sed 's|refs/pull/||;s|/head||' | sort -n | head -80
cd /workspace && git ls-remote origin | grep -E "refs/pull/" | grep "/head$" | awk '{print $2}' | sed 's|refs/pull/||;s|/head||' | sort -n | tail -20
cd /workspace && git ls-remote origin | grep -E "refs/pull/" | grep "/head$" | awk '{print $2}' | sed 's|refs/pull/||;s|/head||' | sort -n | uniq > /tmp/all_prs.txt && wc -l /tmp/all_prs.txt

cd /workspace && git ls-remote origin | grep -E "refs/pull/" | grep "/head$" | awk '{print $2}' | sed 's|refs/pull/||;s|/head||' | sort -n | uniq | awk '$1 >= 1 && $1 <= 100' > /tmp/small_prs.txt && wc -l /tmp/small_prs.txt

cd /workspace && git ls-remote origin | grep -E "refs/pull/" | grep "/head$" | awk '{print $2}' | sed 's|refs/pull/||;s|/head||' | sort -n | uniq | awk '$1 >= 1 && $1 <= 75' > /tmp/target_prs.txt && cat /tmp/target_prs.txt
cd /workspace && for pr in $(cat /tmp/target_prs.txt); do git fetch origin pull/$pr/head 2>&1 | head -5; done
cd /workspace && git branch -a | grep -E "pull/" | head -20
cd /workspace && git branch -a | head -20
cd /workspace && git show-ref | grep -E "refs/pull/" | head -20
cd /workspace && git fetch origin '+refs/pull/*/head:refs/remotes/origin/pr/*' 2>&1 | head -20
cd /workspace && git branch --list 'origin/pr/*' | wc -l
cd /workspace && git for-each-ref refs/remotes/origin/pr/ | head -20
cd /workspace && comm -23 /tmp/target_prs.txt /tmp/fetched_prs.txt
cd /workspace && git log --oneline main-baseline | head -5
cd /workspace && git log --oneline main-baseline | wc -l
cd /workspace && git log --oneline main-baseline -1
cd /workspace && git show d5154c37 --stat | head -30
cd /workspace && git log --oneline main-baseline -10
cd /workspace && git log --oneline main-baseline --all | head -10
cd /workspace && git log --oneline main-baseline -100 | tail -20
cd /workspace && git log --oneline main-baseline -1000 | wc -l
cd /workspace && git log --oneline -1000 | wc -l
cd /workspace && git log --oneline -1000
cd /workspace && git log --oneline -1000 --all
cd /workspace && git log --oneline -1000 | head -50
cd /workspace && git log --oneline -1000 --all | head -50
cd /workspace && git log --oneline -1000 --all | grep -E "^[a-f0-9]+ Merge pull request #([0-9]+)" | awk '{print $6}' | sed 's|#||' | sort -n | uniq | tail -20
cd /workspace && git log --oneline -1000 --all | grep -E "^[a-f0-9]+ Merge pull request" | head -20
cd /workspace && git log --oneline -1000 --all | grep -E "^[a-f0-9]+ Merge pull request" | awk '{print $6}' | sed 's|#||' | sort -n | uniq | tail -20

cd /workspace && git log --oneline -1000 --all | grep -E "^[a-f0-9]+ Merge pull request" | awk '{print $6}' | head -20
cd /workspace && git log --oneline -1000 --all | grep -E "^[a-f0-9]+ Merge pull request" | head -20
cd /workspace && git log --oneline -1000 --all | grep -E "^[a-f0-9]+ Merge pull request" | sed 's/.*#//' | awk '{print $1}' | grep -E "^[0-9]+$" | sort -n | uniq | tail -20
cd /workspace && git log --oneline -1000 --all | grep -E "^[a-f0-9]+ Merge pull request" | sed 's/.*#//' | awk '{print $1}' | grep -E "^[0-9]+$" | sort -n | uniq | head -20

cd /workspace && git log --oneline -1000 --all | grep -E "^[a-f0-9]+ Merge pull request" | sed 's/.*#//' | awk '{print $1}' | grep -E "^[0-9]+$" | sort -n | uniq > /tmp/merged_prs.txt && cat /tmp/merged_prs.txt | wc -l
